text:
(a) There are **17** open pull requests across all repositories.

(b) The repository with the most open pull requests is **acme/infra**, which has **9** open pull requests.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def open-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))
(def total-count (count open-prs))
(def by-repo (group-by :repo open-prs))
(def repo-counts (map (fn [[repo prs]] {:repo repo :count (count prs)}) by-repo))
(def top-repo (apply max-key :count repo-counts))
{:total-open-prs total-count :top-repo top-repo}"}

text:
(a) There are **17** open pull requests across all repositories.

(b) The repository with the most open pull requests is **acme/infra**, which has **9** open pull requests.
